rationale: No headlines this cycle directly affect Portugal; Beirut strikes and Iran deal uncertainty have only marginal indirect energy relevance for a western EU peripheral economy. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue; Trump says attacks unjustified, Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East instability and Iran deal uncertainty could marginally affect global energy prices, with minor indirect impact on Portuguese consumers.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain (Cártama, Málaga) is geographically close and relevant to Iberian tourism safety awareness, though impact on Portugal is minimal.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large UK-Japan investment deal has negligible direct impact on Portugal but signals continued Western economic activity that mildly supports EU trade environment.
